message:
refactor(tests): migrate retry, webhook, sharding, protocol_recovery from tokio::test to runtime_compat (ft-e34d9.10.2.3.1)

Convert 54 #[tokio::test] async tests across 4 files to #[test] with
run_async_test helper backed by runtime_compat::RuntimeBuilder:
- retry.rs: 12 tests
- webhook.rs: 12 tests
- sharding.rs: 14 tests
- protocol_recovery.rs: 16 tests

Uses Write tool for full-file rewrite to prevent linter reversion.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
